/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libwhole_body_controller.so -o libwhole_body_controller.so CMakeFiles/whole_body_controller.dir/src/deformations_history_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whole_body_controller.dir/src/control_tasks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whole_body_controller.dir/src/prioritized_tasks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whole_body_controller.dir/src/whole_body_controller.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/hierarchical_optimization/lib:/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/robot_model/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/quadprog/lib:/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/ryml/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/hierarchical_optimization/lib/libhierarchical_optimization.so /home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/robot_model/lib/librobot_model.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpinocchio.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so /home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/quadprog/lib/libquadprog.so /home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/ryml/lib/libryml.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libament_index_cpp.so
